svg.text: LDG Tuner Controller — Fritzing-Style Wiring Diagram
NodeMCU ESP32S v1.1 (USB top) + BTT TFT35-SPI V2.1 + AT-1000ProII
Pin-to-Pin Connections (NodeMCU ESP32S v1.1, USB top)

g.text: Display→ESP32: P7(MOSI)→23 | P8(MISO)→19 | P5(CS)→5 | P4(DC)→15 | P3(SDA)→21 | P2(SCL)→22 | P1(IRQ)→SVN
Display→ESP32: P10(+5V)→5V | P9(GND)→GND | Tuner: Pin2→GND | Pin3→16 | Pin4→17 | Pin1: N/C
Voltage Sense: 100k/22k divider → 34 | Power: 13.8V → LM7805 → 5V → VIN
